site.name: Te Kapa o te Ao 2026 - Maramataka
site.shortName: Te Kapa o te Ao FIFA 2026
site.description: Kōwhiria ō kapa me ngā whakataetae, ka tikiake, ka ohauru rānei ki te maramataka o Te Kapa o te Ao FIFA 2026.

hero.imageAlt: Papa whakataetae o Te Kapa o te Ao 2026 me ngā haki o ngā whenua manaaki me te ipu
hero.description: Kōwhiria ngā kapa e tautoko ana koe, tīpakohia ngā whakataetae e hira ana, ka tikiake, ka ohauru rānei mā te pāwhiri kotahi.

steps.pickTeamsFirst: Kōwhiria ngā kapa i te tuatahi
steps.selectGamesInStep3: Tīpakohia ngā whakataetae i te hipanga 3
steps.selectToContinue: Tīpakohia kia kotahi te kōwhiringa kia haere tonu ai
steps.step1Description: Kōwhiria ngā kapa ā-motu e hiahia ana koe ki te whai, tīpakohia rānei i te katoa.
steps.step1Pending: Kōwhiria kia kotahi te kapa kia haere tonu ai
steps.step2Description: Whakatauhia te wā ka puta ai ngā tīmatanga me ngā kaupapa maramataka.
steps.step3Description: Tirohia ngā whakataetae e haere mai ana, ngā hua kua hipa rānei.
steps.step3Pending: Tīpakohia kia kotahi te whakataetae hei kaweake
steps.step4Description: Ohaurua ki te puna ora — ka whakakīia ngā hoariri whakataetae whakamutunga i te wā e whakamua ana ō kapa.

matchBrowser.pickTeamsUpcoming: Kōwhiria ngā kapa i runga ake kia kite ngā whakataetae e haere mai.
matchBrowser.allUpcoming: Ngā whakataetae katoa e haere mai ana ka taea te tāpiri ki tō maramataka.
matchBrowser.teamUpcoming: Ngā whakataetae e haere mai mō ō kapa — ka whakakīia ngā whakataetae whakamutunga i te wā ka puta ngā hua.
matchBrowser.pickTeamsPast: Kōwhiria ngā kapa i runga ake kia kite ngā hua kua hipa.
matchBrowser.allPast: Ngā kaute whakamutunga mai i te whakataetae katoa.
matchBrowser.teamPast: Ngā kaute whakamutunga mō ō kapa.

matchList.title: Whakataetae
matchList.emptyDefault: Tīpakohia kotahi, neke atu rānei ngā kapa i runga ake kia kite ō rātou whakataetae.
matchList.noUpcomingAll: Kāore he whakataetae e haere mai i tēnei wā.
matchList.noUpcomingTeams: Kāore he whakataetae e haere mai mō ō kapa.
matchList.noResultsAll: Kāore anō kia puta ngā hua.
matchList.noResultsTeams: Kāore anō kia puta ngā hua mō ō kapa.
matchList.pickTeamsResults: Kōwhiria ngā kapa i runga ake kia kite ngā hua.
matchList.selectedCount: {selected} o {total} kua tīpakohia mō te maramataka

calendarView.tapDayHint: Pāwhiria tētahi rā kua miramira kia kite ngā kaute, kia tīpako rānei i ngā whakataetae e haere mai.

timezone.stepHint: Ka whakamahi ngā wā whakataetae me ngā kaupapa maramataka i tēnei rohe wā.
timezone.currentlyOffset: I tēnei wā {offset} — ka whakahoutia ngā wā tīmatanga ina huri tēnei.
timezone.timesShownIn: Ngā wā e whakaaturia ana i
timezone.resetDetected: Whakahoki ki te rohe wā i kitea ({label})

calendarActions.googleTitleMobile: Ka whakatuwhera te taupānga Google Calendar mēnā kua tāuta, ki te paetukutuku pūkoro rānei
calendarActions.googleTitleDesktop: Ohauru i Google Calendar — ka whakahoutia ngā kapa whakamutunga ā-aunoa
calendarActions.outlookTitleMobile: Ka whakatuwhera Outlook, te tukutuku pūkoro rānei hei ohauru — ka tukutahi i muri i te whakaū
calendarActions.outlookTitleDesktop: Ohauru i Outlook i te tukutuku — ka whakahoutia ngā kapa whakamutunga ā-aunoa
calendarActions.appleTitle: Ka whakatuwhera Apple Calendar tika i runga iPhone/iPad hei ohauru ki te puna ora
calendarActions.downloadTitle: Tikiake he whakaahua kotahi o ō whakataetae i tīpakohia
calendarActions.subscribeAllHint: Kei roto i tō ohaurunga ngā whakataetae katoa e haere mai. Ka whakamahi te tikiake .ics i ngā whakataetae kua tohua anake.
calendarActions.subscribeTeamsHint: Ka whai tō ohaurunga i ngā kapa i kōwhiria e koe puta noa i te tūāpapa. Ka whakamahi te tikiake .ics i ngā whakataetae kua tohua anake.
calendarActions.pastScoresHint: Ka whakaatu ngā whakataetae kua hipa i ngā kaute anake.
calendarActions.mobileHint: I runga pūkoro, ka whakatuwhera ngā hono i tō taupānga maramataka mēnā kua tāuta. Ka whakamahi pea a Google me Outlook i te pūtirotiro hei whakaū — ka tukutahi ki tō waea i muri iho.
calendarActions.eventsUseTimezone: Ka whakamahi ngā kaupapa i {timezone}{offset}. Huri i te rohe wā i te hipanga 2.
calendarActions.help1: Ka ohauru a Google me Outlook ki te puna ora — whakaū kotahi i tō taupānga maramataka. Ka whakahoutia ngā ingoa whakamutunga ina whakatauhia ngā kapa.
calendarActions.help2: I runga pūkoro, ka ngana ngā hono ki te whakatuwhera i te taupānga taketake. Ki te kore e puta he mea, whakamahia te Tikiake .ics, ohauru rānei mai i te pūtirotiro papamahi.
calendarActions.help3: Ki te kī a Outlook "Kāore i taea te kawemai i te maramataka", whakamahia "Tikiake .ics" me Tāpiri maramataka → Tukuake mai i te kōnae.
calendarActions.help4Work: Pūkete mahi, kura rānei? <link></link>, tikiake rānei i te .ics ka whakamahi Kōnae → Whakatuwhera me Kawemai.
calendarActions.help5: Hei whakamahi i te kākāriki i Google Calendar: kimihia "FIFA World Cup 2026" i te pae taha mauī → ⋮ → kōwhiria te kākāriki.

donate.promptTitle: Kua rite te maramataka — {count, plural, one {# whakataetae} other {# whakataetae}} kua kaweake
donate.promptBody: He kore utu te whakamahi. Mēnā i whakaora i a koe i te wā, hokona he kawhe māku anō.
donate.footerTitle: E pai ana ki a koe te maramataka?
donate.footerBody: He kore utu tēnei kaupapa. Mēnā i whakaora i a koe i te wā, hokona he kawhe māku anō.

github.label: Tukuna he take, whakapā atu rānei ki GitHub
github.tooltip: Tukuna he take, whakapā atu rānei

footer.disclaimer: Kāore e whai pānga ki FIFA. He mōhiohio anake ngā raraunga whakataetae.

privacy.title: Kaupapa here tūmataitinga
privacy.metaDescription: Kaupapa here tūmataitinga mō te Maramataka Te Kapa o te Ao 2026.
privacy.overviewBody: He utauta kore utu a {siteName} ({url}) hei hanga i tētahi maramataka whakataetae whaiaro mō Te Kapa o te Ao FIFA 2026. Kāore mātou e hiahia pūkete, kāore hoki e penapena i ō kōwhiringa kapa, whakataetae rānei i ā mātou tūmau.
privacy.collectTitle: Ngā mea ka kohikohi e mātou
privacy.analyticsBody: Ka taea e Google Analytics te kohikohi i ngā raraunga whakamahinga ingoamuna (ngā whārangi, momo pūrere, whenua). Tirohia
privacy.analyticsLink: te kaupapa here tūmataitinga a Google
privacy.adsBody: Mēnā kua whakahohea, ka whakamahi pea a Google AdSense i ngā pihikete hei whakaatu panui. Tirohia
privacy.adsLink: ngā kaupapa here panui a Google
privacy.storageBody: Ka penapenahia tō manakohanga rohe wā i tō pūtirotiro anake.
privacy.donationsBody: Ka whakahaerehia ngā utu e Stripe. Kāore mātou e whiwhi, e penapena rānei i ngā taipitopito kāri.
privacy.feedsBody: Ina kaweake koe i te maramataka, ka tukuna ngā ID whakataetae i te URL hei hanga i te kōnae ICS. He mea tika tēnei mō te mahi a te ratonga. Kāore mātou e taki i ngā whakataetae motuhake i tīpakohia e koe.
privacy.thirdPartiesBody: Ka whakamahi mātou i a Vercel (manaaki), Google Analytics, Google AdSense (kōwhiringa), me Stripe (koha). He kaupapa here tūmataitinga motuhake tā ia mea.
privacy.contactBody: He pātai? Huakina he take i te pūtaka GitHub o te kaupapa, whakapā rānei ki te rangatira pae.
privacy.disclaimer: Kāore e whai pānga ki FIFA. He mōhiohio anake ngā hōtaka whakataetae.
